On this page

Prolific Worker ​

The Prolific worker is a specialist automation surface inside the wider OpenSIN fleet. It is not a primary end-user product surface and should be read as a specialized operations capability, not as the main entry point to OpenSIN.

What It Is ​

  • browser-driven task automation for Prolific workflows
  • human-like interaction safeguards
  • specialist runtime for survey-oriented execution

Scope Note ​

This public page intentionally avoids exposing internal-only runtime details, host-specific secrets, or brittle implementation assumptions. For canonical ownership and current runtime placement, verify the owning repo and fleet registry before extending this surface.

Related ​

  • Fleet Overview
  • Stealth Browser Operator
  • Hacker Bypass & No-Wall Directive
